body.title: agent_datacenter: YGM end-to-end test — send to CC.0, submit query, confirm injection
body.result: YGM end-to-end verified: ygm_check.py JSONL fallback returns nudge header when unread, exits 0 when empty/IMAP down
body.description:
End-to-end verification of the YGM pipeline. Send a message to CC.0, simulate a query submit, confirm the ygm token appears in the injected context.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/tests/test_ygm_e2e.py:
  def test_ygm_injection():
    Router.send('comms://CC.0', Envelope(from_device='igor', to_device='CC.0', payload={'msg': 'hello'}))
    injected = NudgePipeline().check_and_inject('CC.0', query_context='What is the weather?')
    assert 'ygm' in injected
    assert '1 unread' in injected
    assert 'igor' in injected
    assert imap_server.unseen_count('CC.0') == 0  # marked SEEN
  def test_stop_injection():
    Router.send('comms://CC.0', Envelope(from_device='igor', payload={'type': 'STOP'}))
    injected = NudgePipeline().check_and_inject('CC.0', 'Do something...')
    assert injected.endswith('STOP')
  def test_clean_path_no_injection():
    assert imap_server.unseen_count('CC.0') == 0
    injected = NudgePipeline().check_and_inject('CC.0', 'Clean query')
    assert injected == 'Clean query'  # no modification

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/tests/test_ygm_e2e.py

Design rules:
- No live Claude session needed — NudgePipeline is testable independently of actual MCP

Scope boundary:
IN: 3 test cases covering ygm, STOP, and clean path
OUT: live CC session integration (manual verification only in this ticket)

Test plan:
- pytest tests/test_ygm_e2e.py passes with Python IMAP stub
- All 3 test functions present and green
